name: calendar-app
description: calendar app with Vite + React + TS + Stitches

scripts.dev:frontend: cross-env FORCE_COLOR=1 npm run --silent dev --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env FORCE_COLOR=1 npx kill-port 3001 && npm run --silent dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev: cross-env FORCE_COLOR=1 concurrently --kill-others --handle-input --names "FRONT,BACK" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend
scripts.test:watch: cross-env FORCE_COLOR=1 concurrently --names "FRONT,BACK" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run test:watch --prefix frontend" "npm run test:watch --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend

author: DAT <terlovoy77@gmail.com>
